computerReply: Unoccupied sections are being closed down in order to clear space in the main computer banks. It is necessary to facilitate the system upgrade. Full power can be restored if needed.
situationalContext: Riker activates a panel in a darkened corridor to inquire about a power reduction.
userQuery: There's a power reduction in section L-Ninety Four. Explain.

situationalContext: Riker stands outside the holodeck, requesting the computer to generate a musical atmosphere.
userQuery: I'd like some place to play some music. A little atmosphere.

Riker further refines his holodeck program, requesting a specific location for the jazz.

userQuery: Kansas City. No, wait. New Orleans. Bourbon Street Bar, New Orleans. Around two a.m.

computerReply: Estimate release of antimatter in four minutes eighteen seconds. Seventeen seconds. Sixteen seconds.

userQuery: where are the Captain and Commander Riker?

computerReply: Initiated as a programmed response. The magnetic field containing the antimatter had weakened. There was no fail-safe available.
situationalContext: Picard is in the holodeck, demanding an explanation from the computer regarding the Red Alert.
Picard is in the holodeck, questioning the computer about the lack of notification for the Red Alert.

computerReply: The magnetic field is now restored. Containment is restored. Propulsion is at maximum efficiency.

Picard is in the holodeck, asking the computer to locate Lieutenant Commander Data.

computerReply: All Enterprise personnel except the Captain and First Officer have been evacuated.

computerReply: Co-ordinates four one five nine point two six by eight one nine two one by three one two. Heading two three three mark four five.

computerReply: Planet Bynaus in the Beta Magellan system.

Picard is in the holodeck, asking the computer to confirm if the Bynars have stolen the Enterprise.
userQuery: Am I to understand the Bynars have stolen the Enterprise?

computerReply: Auto-destruct will detonate in four minutes and fifty-nine seconds.
